center-content.styles: display: grid; place-items: center; text-align: center;

auto-layout.styles: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--zi-space-4);

stack-h.styles: display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; gap: var(--zi-space-4);

surface-elevated.styles: background-color: var(--zi-bg-surface); border-radius: var(--zi-radius-md); box-shadow: var(--zi-shadow-md); padding: var(--zi-space-4);

antigravity-fill.styles: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--zi-space-4); align-content: flex-start;

antigravity-center.styles: display: grid; place-items: center; gap: var(--zi-space-4); width: 100%;

macros.z-nav: <nav class="stack-h surface-elevated" style="position: sticky; top: 0; justify-content: space-between; padding: var(--zi-space-4) var(--zi-space-8); margin-bottom: var(--zi-space-12); z-index: 100;">{{content}}</nav>
macros.z-hero: <header class="center-content" style="padding: var(--zi-space-24) var(--zi-space-4); position: relative; overflow: hidden;">{{content}}</header>
macros.z-grid: {{content}}
